name: Lullaby of Obedience
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>声</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>服</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ふく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>従</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
Pay 2000 LP and declare 1 Monster Card name; your opponent looks at their Deck, reveals 1 of the declared monsters if there is any, and chooses 1 of these effects to be applied.
● The declared monster is added to the hand of the player who activated this card.
● The player who activated this card Special Summons the declared monster to their field in Attack Position, ignoring its Summoning conditions.

sets.set: Duelist Pack: Rivals of the Pharaoh

action: Reveals cards from your opponent's Deck
Adds from your opponent's Deck to your hand
summoning: Special Summons from your opponent's Deck to your field
